2604.27267.title: From Prompt to Physical Actuation: Holistic Threat Modeling of LLM-Enabled Robotic Systems
2604.27267.paper_summary: As large language models are integrated into autonomous robotic systems for task planning and control, compromised inputs or unsafe model outputs can propagate through the planning pipeline to physical-world consequences. Although prior work has studied robotic cybersecurity, adversarial perception attacks, and LLM safety independently, no existing study traces how these threat categories interact and propagate across trust boundaries in a unified architectural model. We address this gap by modeling an LLM-enabled autonomous robot in an edge-cloud architecture as a hierarchical Data Flow Diagram and applying STRIDE-per-interaction analysis across six boundary-crossing interaction points using a three-category taxonomy of Conventional Cyber Threats, Adversarial Threats, and Conversational Threats. The analysis reveals that these categories converge at the same boundary crossings, and we trace three cross-boundary attack chains from external entry points to unsafe physical actuation, each exposing a distinct architectural property: the absence of independent semantic validation between user input and actuator dispatch, cross-modal translation from visual perception to language-model instruction, and unmediated boundary crossing through provider-side tool use. To our knowledge, this is the first DFD-based threat analysis integrating all three threat categories across the full perception-planning-actuation pipeline of an LLM-enabled robotic system.
2604.27267.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型被整合進自主機器人系統中以進行任務規劃和控制，受損的輸入或不安全的模型輸出可能會通過規劃流程傳播到物理世界的後果。儘管先前的研究獨立探討了機器人網絡安全、對抗性感知攻擊和大型語言模型的安全性，但目前尚無研究追蹤這些威脅類別如何在統一的架構模型中互動並跨越信任邊界。我們通過將一個支持大型語言模型的自主機器人建模為邊緣-雲架構中的分層數據流圖，並在六個跨邊界的互動點上應用基於互動的STRIDE分析，來填補這一空白，使用傳統網絡威脅、對抗性威脅和對話威脅的三類分類法。分析顯示這些類別在相同的邊界交叉處匯聚，我們追蹤了三條跨邊界的攻擊鏈，從外部入口點到不安全的物理執行，每條鏈揭示了一個獨特的架構特性：用戶輸入與執行器調度之間缺乏獨立的語義驗證、從視覺感知到語言模型指令的跨模態翻譯，以及通過提供者端工具使用的無中介邊界跨越。據我們所知，這是首個基於數據流圖的威脅分析，整合了所有三類威脅，涵蓋了支持大型語言模型的機器人系統的完整感知-規劃-執行流程。
2604.27267.author: Neha Nagaraja et.al.
2604.27267.authors: Neha Nagaraja, Hayretdin Bahsi, Carlo R. da Cunha
